infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro reads your health data to provide personalized longevity insights and recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro writes workout and nutrition summaries back to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro uses the camera to scan food for nutrition analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro accesses your photos to analyze food images for nutrition tracking.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro uses Face ID for secure app access and HIPAA-compliant session management.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: AI Longevity Pro uses the local network during development.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow AI Longevity Pro to use Face ID for secure access.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AI Longevity Pro to use the camera for food scanning.
